steps.description: Click Explore GPTs in the left sidebar of ChatGPT.
Click the + Create button in the top right corner of the Explore GPTs page.
Click the Configure tab at the top of the GPT builder.
Type the following name in the Name field.
Type the following in the Description field.
Download the instructions file below. Open it, copy everything, and paste into the Instructions field.
Scroll down to Capabilities and check all options - Web Search, Apps, Canvas, Image Generation, and Code Interpreter & Data Analysis.
Click the Create button in the top right corner to save. When the confirmation dialog appears, click View GPT.
Inside your Custom GPT, upload your mission debrief .txt file from Level 2 and send this prompt.
